title: Reverse Array
description:

Implement an efficient solution.

    # TODO: Reverse the array in-place

import sys
def main():
    input_data = sys.stdin.read().split()
    if not input_data: return
    n = int(input_data[0])
    arr = [int(x) for x in input_data[1:n+1]]
    reverseArray(arr)
    print(" ".join(map(str, arr)))
if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()

referenceSolution.completeCode:
# --- USER SOLUTION START ---
def reverseArray(arr):
    arr.reverse()
# --- USER SOLUTION END ---

import sys
def main():
    input_data = sys.stdin.read().split()
    if not input_data: return
    n = int(input_data[0])
    arr = [int(x) for x in input_data[1:n+1]]
    reverseArray(arr)
    print(" ".join(map(str, arr)))
if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()
